name: git_ops
description: Perform common git operations: diff, diff-tail, status, log, add, commit, checkout, stash, show, summary, and cleanup.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action: diff, diff-tail, status, log, add, commit, checkout, stash, show, summary, or cleanup

examples.expected: Combined git diff --stat and git status --short output
Last 5 lines of each modified file
Removes .bak files and shows git diff --stat

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces multiple separate git commands with a single script call, and summary replaces the git-diff-stat-plus-status pattern, saving 2+ steps per change review.
